title: The Aftermath Turns Cold

dialogue.text: That moron!! No help at all!!

dialogue.text: ...I...I'll get to Dressrossa on my own....!!

summary: The Aftermath Turns Cold. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
